Operation 'googleMapsReviews' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Current description is too minimal and lacks critical details. Enhanced version specifies what input is needed (place identifier), what data is returned (review fields), and mentions pagination/filtering capabilities. This helps AI agents understand how to construct requests and interpret responses.

data.current_description: Retrieve reviews for a place on Google Maps.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve reviews for a specific place on Google Maps. Requires place identifier (such as place ID or query). Returns review data including reviewer name, rating, review text, review date, and reviewer profile information. Supports pagination and filtering options.
data.reasoning: Current description is too minimal and lacks critical details. Enhanced version specifies what input is needed (place identifier), what data is returned (review fields), and mentions pagination/filtering capabilities. This helps AI agents understand how to construct requests and interpret responses.

message: Operation 'googleMapsPhotos' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, not_actionable. Current description is identical to summary and provides no actionable information. Enhanced version specifies required inputs (place identifier), returned data (photo URLs, captions, metadata), and pagination support. This enables AI agents to understand when and how to use this operation effectively.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieve photos for a specific place on Google Maps. Requires place identifier (such as place ID or query). Returns photo URLs, captions, and metadata including upload date and photographer information. Supports pagination for retrieving multiple photos.
data.reasoning: Current description is identical to summary and provides no actionable information. Enhanced version specifies required inputs (place identifier), returned data (photo URLs, captions, metadata), and pagination support. This enables AI agents to understand when and how to use this operation effectively.

message: Operation 'getRequest' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. Current description lacks context about the request lifecycle and how this operation fits into the async workflow. Enhanced version clarifies that this polls async operations, explains the required input (request ID from initial operation), describes possible status values, and explains the use case. This helps AI agents understand when to call this operation and how to handle responses.

data.current_description: Retrieve the status or results of an async request.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve the current status or results of an asynchronous scraping request. Requires the request ID returned from an initial scraping operation. Returns request status (pending, completed, or failed), progress information, and results data when available. Use this to poll for completion of long-running scraping tasks.
data.reasoning: Current description lacks context about the request lifecycle and how this operation fits into the async workflow. Enhanced version clarifies that this polls async operations, explains the required input (request ID from initial operation), describes possible status values, and explains the use case. This helps AI agents understand when to call this operation and how to handle responses.
